response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including roles involving C++ (e.g., National Instruments) and performance-critical systems (e.g., Optilyz, Altom Consulting). However, his recent experience is heavily skewed toward TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with limited evidence of recent C++ or secure industrial-cybersecurity work. His GitHub and GitLab profiles also lack visible C++ contributions in the last 3-5 years. While he demonstrates strong problem-solving and architectural skills, the alignment with the Senior Manager — Digital Solutions role (C++ focus) is uncertain without further clarification on his current C++ proficiency and industrial cybersecurity experience.
strengths: Strong background in C++ from early career (e.g., National Instruments role)
Extensive experience with high-performance systems and low-latency applications
Proven track record in architecture, mentorship, and secure development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Recent work heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js, not C++ or industrial automation
Limited visible evidence of recent C++ or STL contributions in public repositories
No clear experience with IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards in recent roles
